# USA Car Finder

> Operator panel for searching, analyzing, and reporting on US auction
> vehicles (Copart, IAAI). Includes scraper jobs, AI analysis, cost
> calculator, watchlist, and PDF report generation.

## Pages

- [Panel operatora](/): Main scraper panel — start jobs, browse results, run AI analysis.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Analytics dashboard with charts of analyses, top makes, and red flags.
- [Kalkulator kosztów](/calculator): VIN decoder, recall lookup, and total landed-cost calculator for US auctions.
- [Baza danych](/database): Browse the records database — past analyses, lots, and clients.
- [Watchlist](/watchlist): Tracked auction lots with comparison tools.
- [Ustawienia](/settings): API keys, AI provider, and integration settings.
